$description: ALIVE brand kernel — the DNA as data. Hand-authored source of truth for the NEW brand (post-genome, 2026-07-03). Expressions (expressions/*.json) map these onto a shared CSS contract. Human canon: /brand/standards.md

color.$description: OUR palette. Cool field always (K3). Carrier = the red family, one per view, semantically loaded (K2).

carrier.$description: What red IS must be decided per expression: a needle, a room, a seal. Never two saturated elements in one view.

signal.$description: the one room allowed to shout

motion.$description: Machined physics (K4). Fixed across ALL expressions; only the metaphor voicing varies (crown click / bearing roll / stamp thunk).

type.$description: Argued faces only (K5). Slots are cast per expression; every face carries its why.

Marcellus.why: Roman inscriptional capitals — the case-back engraving

B612.why: Commissioned by Airbus for cockpit displays; legibility certified where misreading kills

Anybody.why: Chrome-stretch supergraphics; the width axis is the material

Archivo.why: Built for archives and highlighting — the gallery didactic

Fragment Mono.why: Helvetica gone monospace — chrome-cool plate numbers

Redaction.why: Kaphar/Betts/MCKL, MoMA PS1 — the legal system's erasure as type; grades are the loading language

Karrik.why: Velvetyne — tribute to nameless dead foundries; vernacular, uncorrected

disqualified: the AI-startup serif of the month

laws.carrier_singularity: exactly one saturated element per view
laws.cool_field: warmth only as material depth, never atmosphere
laws.dual_hour: night = the world with lights off, never inversion
laws.micro_reference: mono metadata codes present on every artifact
